programme.title: E109 - Warriors Against the Realm / Sunganduel
programme.desc: Lily introduces Jack to her favorite video game, but when he keeps losing, Jack binges the game and turns into a toxic troll. // Slice of life vignettes that illustrate the modern-day family dynamic.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E112 - Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: When Tori finds out that Cat is dating her ex-boyfriend, her jealousy threatens to ruin their relationship. Meanwhile, Trina uses fish to make everyone's feet super smooth but at what cost?

programme.title: E314 - Scales of Justice / Crimes of Fashion
programme.desc: When Lana learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction she springs into action. // When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde (as Ace and Jack) take on the case.

programme.title: Hope After Loss
programme.desc: Nothing prepares us for the devastating loss of a loved one. The grief is overwhelming. And it doesn't go away quickly. Some say it never will. But sometimes women successfully turn their grief into action. They do something meaningful that not only transforms their own lives, but possibly the lives of many others.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Talking Europe
programme.desc: Talking Europe guides you to the world of Europe's politics and cultures. Presented by Catherine Nicholson, the program revolves around top EU issues and events. Find out latest news from politicians and researchers joined by the guests of the program.

programme.title: News[Live]

programme.title: French Connections
programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: Prince Gerald makes an unexpected visit and Jill and Hadis have to act close to prove she was not kidnapped.

programme.title: E7 - I Want To Stop Living The Slow Life, So I Have Decided To Start In The Drag
programme.desc: Jill and the others ride a dragon to Rahelm but are attacked by Hadis' uncle George, who claims he is a false Emperor.

programme.title: Sound
programme.desc: Believe it or not but we all have orchestras in our closets and cabinets. In this episode Steve Spangler shows how to make wacky musical instruments from standard household items such as glasses, pipes, and cars.

programme.title: The Wildlife Hospital
programme.desc: Poppy, the cat, needs urgent dental surgery before she finds a new home. Hundreds of chickens get a bath, and at the wildlife hospital, the Junior Vets treat a rabbit with an injured leg and some baby starlings who have lost their mum.

programme.title: The Sin Bin
programme.desc: Ice hockey teammates Liam and Rais have the biggest match of the season against their fiercest rivals. Meanwhile, keen skater Kaira is going for her gold award, but little does she know that someone else in the family has also been practicing down at the rink.

programme.title: Big Money
programme.desc: Why do some coins have holes in them? The team flies to Yap, Micronesia, where coins have holes. But to get one of the valuable ‘rai', they have to make and trade a handmade canoe! After the exchange, the Team learns there's been a big misunderstanding.

programme.title: A4 Paper
programme.desc: Blank paper? No problem, Hepi and Briko are full of ideas.

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: The Not So Fishy Mystery
programme.desc: When the fish in the local pond all seem to disappear, Addison and Tess fear that they ended up as fish sticks in the school cafeteria's lunch special and set out to solve the mystery

programme.title: Glass Jar
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko are using their creativity to make the best use of old glass jars.

programme.title: Day of the Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Ricky makes dragon feet trainers and a beastly collage inspired by Hannah Hoech and finds himself in a fairy tale after being trolled by his virtual assistant. Things get weirder when Gav shows up with three little pigs.

programme.title: Reckless Rescue
programme.desc: There is an emergency in the Russian Arctic - a family of polar bears got trapped on a large piece of ice, stranded in the middle of the Arctic Ocean. Only the MeteoHeroes can save them. Nubess and Thermo are on their way to help.

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Repair Socks
programme.desc: As the Grimwade boys sort through the laundry, a pile of odd socks emerges. In a family of eight, that is no surprise. Perhaps there is something they can do about it? Let's find out!

programme.title: Recycle Paper
programme.desc: The Grimwades love art, but a shortage of paper stops the activity. Luckily the tree that Dad is planting in the garden gives them an idea. Trees are one way to make paper. Let's go green and find out more.

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: Help Pooch get over the gap by building a nice strong bridge! We're here to support you.

programme.title: Neurons, Neurons, Neurons!
programme.desc: Eric learns that neurons are the brain's tiny building blocks. He does an experiment to show what they are and how they work. He is surprised to learn that giraffes have neurons that are five metres long.

programme.title: Superchutes!
programme.desc: Eric makes a parachute that will slow down a falling egg just enough so it doesn't get smashed when it hits the ground. But first he experiments to figure out the best parachute size. He discovers that NASA also use parachutes to drop robotic probes on to the moon.

programme.title: Hearing
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at hearing, and show you an experiment to see a sound wave in action!

programme.title: Are You Drinking Enough Water?
programme.desc: The doctors explain how your urine can tell you if you've drunk enough water. Dr. Chris looks at how snake venom can damage the body. In the emergency room, one patient has banged his head on some railings, and another has a huge black eye.

programme.title: Lover Of The Last Empress
programme.desc: The last empress of China, CHI HEI, had dominated the country for over fifty years. Yet, her rise to power owned much to her manipulation of her beauty and sexual appeal. Prior to becoming one of the three thousand concubines chosen to serve the emperor. CHI met KUNG, younger brother of the Emperor; and they fell in love with each other. However, KUNG fled from the relationship to avoid conflicts with his brother. In order to stand out from other concubines, CHI racked her brains to design numerous creative and exciting “on-bed tricks” for the Emperor, who madly enjoyed their lovemaking. After she bore him a son, she became the first lady...

programme.title: The Odd One Dies
programme.desc: Mo is a low-life gangster, who dreams of a better life. He sees his chance when he's promised a $88,000 fee to commit a murder. However, the day before the assassination is meant to take place, Mo bets all his money at a casino, and wins a fortune...

programme.title: It's A Mad Mad Mad World II
programme.desc: After he lost his chance of winning easy money in the original film, Bill became an editor for a newspaper and was sent to Canada for a story. What he thought was a chance to re-launch his career turned out to be a reason to get him fired. Just when the family has settled back down in Hong Kong, Bill's wife realized she has won the lottery in Canada...

programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. programme.title: Le Paris des arts
programme.desc: Une balade culturelle dans Paris en compagnie d'un invité. Avec des sujets présentés des ponts d'un art à un autre, d'un artiste à l'autre, de la France au reste du monde.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles regroupées sous un label et une identité visuelle commune et avec la même ligne éditoriale : raconter l'actualité via le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Plan B
programme.desc: Découverte d'initiatives concrètes et innovantes en matière d'écologie, d'économie circulaire, de transition énergétique, et de consommation responsable.

programme.title: Le journal de l'Afrique
programme.desc: Direction l'Afrique pour un rendez-vous quotidien afin de suivre l'actualité du continent africain, avec des correspondants et des invités en plateau.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Coup de projecteur sur tout ce qui fait et fera la journée : actualité nationale et internationale, économie et revue de presse, analysée et décryptée par des journalistes.

programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: E4 - The Queen is Back
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: E2 - Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Get to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner. Then learn why Ferinha, another local female, struggles with motherhood as more males move in and threaten the youngsters.

programme.title: E4 - The Queen is Back
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: E5 - The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Film a wild dog hunt with Julz as he catches up with the Manzi pack at a kill, and watch for leopards and hyenas as the Kakuli pack takes great risks while waiting for the rains to come. Go on an epic hunt with a returning male of the Stork Colony.

programme.title: E2 - Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: The Nsefu lion pride welcomes seven new cubs during the wet season, when antelope and buffalo are spread far from the river, making them harder to hunt. Learn how the mother lionesses work to keep the boisterous cubs alive.

programme.title: E3 - Kings of Nsefu
programme.desc: Twin brothers with a powerful bond have ruled the Nsefu pride for three years. They’re fathers to all the young, and protectors of their territory. Witness the struggle that unfolds when rival males target their territory.

programme.title: E2 - Saltwater Crocodile
programme.desc: Navigate a mangrove forest in Borneo with the saltwater crocodile, which is perfectly suited to life among the watery roots. Discover how this reptile uses the environment to regulate its temperature and why its epic patience makes it a super hunter.

programme.title: E4 - Chimpanzee
programme.desc: Track chimpanzees through the Rwandan forest with Max, who tries to convince these powerful monkeys that he’s a friend, not a foe. Pick up some key tips on jungle dining and witness complex family dynamics, including grooming and socializing.

programme.title: E1 - Arid Heart
programme.desc: From the vast, dry plains of the interior come some of Australia’s most recognized imagery, such as the monolithic red rock of Uluru and the bounding red kangaroo. But how did the arid center of the continent come to be?

programme.title: E2 - The Great Divide
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces and spanning 3,700 km along the eastern edge of Australia, the Great Dividing Range separates two very different worlds. Aerial footage and intimate studies reveal how species survive and thrive in this mountain home.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E1 - Into the Heat
programme.desc: Meet the unlikely collaborators working to ensure mutual survival in the Kalahari Basin. Learn of an elephant clan’s symbiotic link to fruiting anaboom trees, a meerkat’s alliance with a feisty drongo bird, and more flora-and-fauna odd couples.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Fournie
programme.desc: He's rewriting the rules for haute couture: Julien Fournie's autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection is called ''Premier bouclier'', a hymn to powerful femininity, offering a new take on military clothing.

programme.title: E3 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Classical Painting
programme.desc: The Philadelphia Museum of Art is home to a major collection of American and European works, from the Italian Renaissance to the world of contemporary art. Amongst the French painters, those of the classical period: Vigee Le Brun, Corot, Delacroix, Millet, Couture, Courbet, Puvis de Chavannes...

programme.title: E35 - Grillemont - Le Clos Luce
programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: It's the return of the fresh pasta challenge! Marie-Philip Poulin, hockey player and Olympic medalist, asks the contestants to prepare lasagna.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: E6 - Ready-To-Wear Fashion Shows/Ai In Fashion/Le Chemin Des Maquettes
programme.desc: A look back at the ready-to-wear shows for Autumn-Winter 2025-2026 from Mossi Traore to Paco Rabanne and Enfants Riches Deprimes. AI is making its mark in fashion as stylists, art directors and clothing designers. Le Chemin des Maquettes makes metal fashion pieces for some of the world's top designers.

programme.title: E6 - Natural Beekeeping
programme.desc: Honey, royal jelly, pollen, wax: since ancient times, bees have collected and transformed these products full of virtues. They are found in daily life, in dietary supplements, and in cosmetic formulations. A journey to discover this sector, from the Marquesas Islands to Tahiti.

programme.title: E13 - Weinsanto
programme.desc: Humour, fantasy and a flair for the spectacular all describe Victor Weinsanto's designs. He presents his autumn-winter 2023-2024 ready to wear show.

programme.title: Bloomberg New Economy: Thriving In An Age Of Extremes
programme.desc: Candid conversations with CEOs, investors, and government leaders focused on how to navigate and prosper in this age of economic uncertainty. Hosted by Erik Schatzker in Singapore.

programme.title: E1 - Vietnam
programme.desc: After decades of conflict Vietnam is experiencing a rebirth. The Mekong provides everything - food, shelter and transport.

programme.title: E5 - A Fatal Mistake
programme.desc: Julia receives a call from a worried family who have discovered a very dangerous eastern brown snake under their patio.

programme.title: Jane New Generation
programme.desc: JANE NEW GENERATION is an inspiring look at the life and current projects of world-renowned primatologist and all-around female pioneer Jane Goodall.

programme.title: E8 - Gator Showdown
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens are deep into deer season, investigating a suspected poacher and a felon who shouldn't be using a firearm to hunt.

programme.title: E16 - Out Of Time
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: Season 2 of NCIS: Origins delves deeper into the unstoppable NCIS Camp Pendleton team led by the legendary Mike Franks, as well as Gibbs' early career as a special agent, and reveals the fate of Lala after last season's devastating car crash.

programme.title: E7 - Family Matters
programme.desc: Tess is sent into a community skeptical of the police to discreetly investigate a local Church's potential links to human trafficking following the disappearance of the star soloist of the church's choir. As the girl's whole family comes under suspicion, Sunny brings some much needed perspective to the pressure put on many first generation kids by immigrant parents, helping Tess track the girl down in an unexpected location and uncover the dark truth behind her disappearance. The case prompts Tess to revisit a traumatic event in her childhood with Lucas and show support ahead of his wedding day.

programme.title: E476
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E136
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.
Phoenix Intercontinental Express is a current affairs program airing at midnight that brings people news from Greater China and around the world.

programme.title: E1 - The Cattle King (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Karikal Mahal, built by Moona Kader Sultan, symbolises his rise in Singapore's cattle trade. Lavish parties followed his success, but rivalries and scandals cast shadows on his reputation.

programme.desc: Joseph braces himself for his annual doctor's review. Hwee Ling cancels her travel plans to continue her radiotherapy, and Eugene worries about his marathon training after switching to chemotherapy.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: A Shaun the Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When a visitor from beyond the stars – an impish and adorable alien called LU-LA – crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun soon sees an opportunity for alien-powered fun and adventure, and sets off on a mission to shepherd LU-LA back to her home... Little do the pair know, though, that they are being pursued at every turn by a mysterious alien-hunting government agency, spearheaded by the formidable Agent Red and her bunch of hapless, hazmat-suited goons. Can Shaun and the flock avert Farmageddon on Mossy Bottom Farm before it's too late?

programme.title: Komada - A Whisky Family
programme.desc: Kotaro, a novice editor for a web news, visits Komada Distillery for a project on Japanese craft whisky. Led by a young female president Rui who recently took over the family business, the distillery works hard to reproduce its signature whisky KOMA they had to stop making years ago. KOMA was a brand that Rui's family had lovingly preserved over generations and a symbol of happiness for all. However, not to mention financial backing, too many clues are missing to revive the whisky once lost. Rui, Kotaro, and the distillery supporters pull together every thread to bring back the whisky filled with family memories.

programme.title: Jack Taylor: The Guards
programme.desc: Jack is hired to search for a missing teenage daughter which he traces to a sleazy manager Ford's factory and illegal sex recordings. That turns out only the tip of the iceberg...

programme.title: Jack Taylor: The Magdalen Martyrs
programme.desc: Jack is hired by the daughter of a former inmate of the infamous Magdalen Laundries to find the identity of a former nun, known only as Lucifer, who was notorious for taking pleasure in torturing the girls.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: K-pop Idols Meet the World! A one-of-a-kind K-pop entertainment show where idols experience global cultures and connect with fans worldwide.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: K-pop Idols Meet the World! A one-of-a-kind K-pop entertainment show where idols experience global cultures and connect with fans worldwide.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E6 - Digging into Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready to dig into Earth Week with CoComelon! Cody helps Mom with backyard chores using his cool digger toy. Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden! Watch them plant seeds, water them & harvest delicious pumpkins, carrots & tomatoes. The nature fun continues as JJ counts apples at the farm, learns about composting & goes on a beautiful mountain nature walk with Bingo!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: CNBC On Assignment
programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。
